allow: PowerShell($body = '{"min_wage_increase": 0.5, "duration_days": 30}'; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/simulate" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; Write-Output "Toplam gun: $\($result.total_days\)"; Write-Output "--- Gun 1 ---"; $result.results[0] | ConvertTo-Json; Write-Output "--- Gun 30 ---"; $result.results[-1] | ConvertTo-Json)
Bash(python -c "from app.simulation.engine import run_simulation; from app.simulation.agents import create_population; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from app.simulation.agents import AgentPopulation; print\([f.name for f in AgentPopulation.__dataclass_fields__.values\(\)]\)")
